stories.title: Hero Banner
stories.iWant: to see a hero banner with compelling headline and tagline
stories.soThat: I immediately understand the company's value proposition

stories.title: CTA Button
stories.iWant: to see a Call-to-Action button (Get Quote)
stories.soThat: I can start the insurance process

stories.title: Background Carousel
stories.iWant: to see hero background images (sliding carousel)
stories.soThat: the page feels dynamic and professional
acceptanceCriteria: Images are high quality and optimized

stories.title: Auto-rotate Carousel
stories.iWant: to see auto-rotating carousel (5 second intervals)
stories.soThat: I can view multiple messages without clicking

stories.title: Carousel Navigation Dots
stories.iWant: to see carousel navigation dots
stories.soThat: I can manually jump to specific slides

stories.title: Parallax Scrolling Effect
stories.iWant: to see parallax scrolling effect on hero
stories.soThat: the page feels modern and engaging

stories.title: Responsive Hero
stories.iWant: to see responsive hero that adapts to mobile/tablet/desktop
stories.soThat: I have consistent experience across devices

stories.title: Video Background
stories.iWant: to see video background option in hero
stories.soThat: the page feels more cinematic
stories.notes: Performance concerns, high effort - excluded from MVP

stories.title: Sticky Navigation Bar
stories.iWant: to see a sticky navigation bar
stories.soThat: I can access menu from anywhere on page
acceptanceCriteria: Nav bar stays fixed on scroll

stories.title: Logo and Company Name
stories.iWant: to see logo and company name in header
stories.soThat: I know which company I'm viewing

stories.title: Navigation Menu Items
stories.iWant: to see navigation menu items (Home, About, Services, Claims, Contact)
stories.soThat: I can explore the site

stories.title: Get Quote Button in Header
stories.iWant: to see a Get Quote button in header
stories.soThat: I can start the process from any page
acceptanceCriteria: Button stands out from menu items

stories.title: Hamburger Menu on Mobile
stories.iWant: to see a hamburger menu on mobile
stories.soThat: the nav doesn't take too much space on small screens
acceptanceCriteria: Menu closes on selection or outside click

stories.title: Search Functionality
stories.iWant: to see search functionality in header
stories.soThat: I can find specific information quickly

stories.title: Multi-language Toggle
stories.iWant: to see multi-language toggle in header
stories.soThat: I can switch languages easily
stories.notes: Not in MVP scope - requires translation work

stories.title: Insurance Product Cards
stories.iWant: to see insurance product cards (Life, Health, Auto, Home)
stories.soThat: I can understand available options

stories.title: Card Icons
stories.iWant: to see card icons for each product type
stories.soThat: I can quickly identify categories visually

stories.title: Card Title and Description
stories.iWant: to see card title and description for each product
stories.soThat: I understand what each insurance covers

stories.title: Learn More Button
stories.iWant: to see Learn More button on each card
stories.soThat: I can get detailed information
acceptanceCriteria: Button is present on each card

stories.title: Card Hover Effects
stories.iWant: to see card hover effects (lift, shadow, color change)
stories.soThat: the interface feels interactive

stories.title: Responsive Grid Layout
stories.iWant: to see 4-column grid on desktop, 2-column on tablet, 1-column on mobile
stories.soThat: cards are readable on all devices

stories.title: Featured/Recommended Badge
stories.iWant: to see featured/recommended badge on popular products
stories.soThat: I can make informed decisions
acceptanceCriteria: Badge is visible on featured cards

stories.title: Animated Card Entrance
stories.iWant: to see animated card entrance (staggered fade-in)
stories.soThat: the page feels polished

stories.title: Customer Count or Rating
stories.iWant: to see customer count or rating on each card
stories.soThat: I can gauge popularity/trust

stories.title: Live Pricing
stories.iWant: to see live pricing on cards
stories.soThat: I can compare costs instantly
stories.notes: Requires backend integration - excluded from MVP

stories.title: Customer Testimonials
stories.iWant: to see customer testimonials
stories.soThat: I can build trust in the company

stories.title: Testimonial Carousel
stories.iWant: to see testimonial carousel
stories.soThat: I can view multiple reviews without scrolling
acceptanceCriteria: Carousel displays one testimonial at a time

stories.title: Customer Name and Photo
stories.iWant: to see customer name and photo with each testimonial
stories.soThat: reviews feel authentic

stories.title: Star Ratings
stories.iWant: to see star ratings (1-5) with testimonials
stories.soThat: I can quickly assess satisfaction

stories.title: Arrow Navigation
stories.iWant: to have left/right arrow navigation on carousel
stories.soThat: I can browse testimonials manually

stories.title: Auto-play Testimonials
stories.iWant: to see auto-play testimonials (8 second intervals)
stories.soThat: the carousel feels alive

stories.title: Pause on Hover
stories.iWant: to see pause on hover functionality
stories.soThat: I can read testimonials at my pace

stories.title: Testimonial Counter
stories.iWant: to see testimonial count indicator (e.g., 3 of 12)
stories.soThat: I know how many reviews exist

stories.title: Company Statistics
stories.iWant: to see company statistics (Years in Business, Happy Customers, Claims Paid)
stories.soThat: I can assess company credibility

stories.title: Animated Number Counters
stories.iWant: to see animated number counters that count up when in view
stories.soThat: stats feel dynamic
acceptanceCriteria: Numbers animate when scrolled into view

stories.title: Icons for Statistics
stories.iWant: to see icons next to each statistic
stories.soThat: I can quickly understand what each number represents

stories.title: Background Pattern
stories.iWant: to see subtle background pattern in stats section
stories.soThat: the section stands out visually

stories.title: Live/Updating Stats
stories.iWant: to see live/updating stats (real-time data)
stories.soThat: I see current business activity
stories.notes: Requires real-time API - excluded from MVP

stories.title: Why Choose Us Section
stories.iWant: to see Why Choose Us section
stories.soThat: I understand the company's unique selling points

stories.title: Feature Cards with Icons
stories.iWant: to see feature cards with icons (24/7 Support, Fast Claims, Best Prices)
stories.soThat: benefits are scannable

stories.title: Animated Icons
stories.iWant: to see animated icons (subtle pulse or bounce)
stories.soThat: the section feels alive

stories.title: Short Video Testimonial
stories.iWant: to see short video testimonial in this section
stories.soThat: I can see real customers

stories.title: Live Chat Widget
stories.iWant: to see live chat widget in this section
stories.soThat: I can ask questions instantly
stories.notes: Requires backend integration - excluded from MVP

stories.title: Footer with Company Information
stories.iWant: to see a footer with company information
stories.soThat: I can find contact details

stories.title: Quick Links
stories.iWant: to see quick links in footer (Products, Claims, FAQ, Privacy Policy)
stories.soThat: I can navigate important pages

stories.title: Contact Information
stories.iWant: to see contact information (Phone, Email, Address) in footer
stories.soThat: I know how to reach the company

stories.title: Social Media Icons
stories.iWant: to see social media icons in footer
stories.soThat: I can follow the company on other platforms

stories.title: Newsletter Signup Form
stories.iWant: to see newsletter signup form in footer
stories.soThat: I can stay updated on offers

stories.title: Copyright Notice
stories.iWant: to see copyright notice with current year
stories.soThat: I know the site is maintained

stories.title: Live Chat Transcript
stories.iWant: to see live chat transcript in footer
stories.soThat: I can review past conversations
stories.notes: Requires backend integration - excluded from MVP
